title: Demo: Live mesh visualization
description:
Build real-time visualization for the demo.

## Displays

### Topology view
- Graph of all 500 nodes
- Color by gateway affiliation
- Animate packet flow
- Highlight handoffs

### Spectrum view
- SDR waterfall showing all channels
- Overlay: which channel is LICHEN using
- Show TDMA slot activity

### Stats dashboard
- Nodes online: 500/500
- Packets/sec: XXX
- Packet loss: X.X%
- Gateway load distribution

## Tech stack

- Backend: Python, collect from gateways via CoAP
- Frontend: Web (D3.js or similar)
- Display: Large monitor or projector at booth

## Stretch goals

- Mobile app: attendees see their node's stats
- AR: point phone at node, see its connections
